case_title: BRENDA SMITH VS. ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-31-2014 CONTINUED TO FEB-11-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, BRENDA AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-31-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-03-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-08-2014

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-24-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-11-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-24-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 56808679)
